title: Transformation
steps: Put DH5α chemically competent bacterium on ice for melting about 15min.
Add 50 μl DH5α chemically competent bacterium into 1.5 ml tubes, mix with ligation product or digested product thoroughly, incubate the bacterium on ice for 30 min.
Heat shock the bacterium for exactly 45 s at 42 ℃ water bath.
Place back on ice for 2 min.
Add 500 μ l LB medium to each tube, shake the tubes at 37 ℃, 200 rpm for 45 min.
Centrifuge the bacterium at 3000r for 3 min.
Discard 300 μ l supernatant and resuspend the sediment.
Plate 100 μl for a reaction product.
Incubate plates upside down overnight at 37℃.
creator: Zhujun Wei
